title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at NIIT Technologies
jsonLd.description:
NIIT Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NIIT Technologies:
NIIT Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies!
